name: fomo-kernel-codex-ui
description: Demo-only MCP Apps UI probe for the fomo-kernel review flow.

interface.shortDescription: Dogfood clickable controls and a visual review card in Codex.

interface.defaultPrompt: Run the fomo-kernel Codex UI probe in Traditional Chinese.
